zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Fabian於1409年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏爾德時，他的父親John Fabian29歲，母親Agnes De Childrey26歲。他於1430年與Johanna Hasant在英國英格蘭波克夏爾德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1471年在英國英格蘭享年62歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Fabian于1409年出生在英国英格兰波克夏爾德时，他的父亲John Fabian29岁，母亲Agnes De Childrey26岁。他于1430年与Johanna Hasant在英国英格兰波克夏爾德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1471年在英国英格兰享年62岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fabian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Juan, Jose, Francisco, Pedro, Ana, Lourdes, Gerardo, Luis, Manuel, Mario, Ricardo, Aurelio.

English, German, Dutch, Spanish, Italian (Veneto), and Polish; Czech (mainly Fabián); Slovak (also Fábian, Fabián); Hungarian (Fábián): from a personal name, Latin Fabianus, a derivative of the Roman surname Fabius. The personal name achieved considerable popularity in Europe in the Middle Ages, having been borne by a 3rd-century pope and saint. Compare Faubion .

Americanized or Italianized form of Slovenian Fabjan or Slovenian and Croatian Fabijan: from the personal name Fab(i)jan, Latin Fabianus (see above). In North America, this surname may also be a shortened form of patronymics from this name, e.g. Slovenian Fabjančič, Croatian Fabijančić. See also Fabiani 2.

variants.name: Fabiano
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Orlando, Alberto, Carlo, Carmine, Fedele, Leonardo, Luigi, Mario, Matteo, Rocco, Antonio, Carmelo, Cosmo, Fabio, Franco, Gaspar, Gerardo, Lupercio, Maurilio, Rosario.
Italian: from the personal name Fabiano, a continuation of the Roman surname Fabianus, a derivative of Fabius (see Fabian ).

variants.name: Fabien
meanings: French and West Indian (mainly Haiti): from the personal name Fabien, French form of Fabian . This surname is most common in Haiti.

variants.name: Fabin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Zbigniew.
Polish: variant of   Fabian  .

variants.name: Fabel
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Jacques, Patrice.
German, Dutch, and French: from the personal name Fabel, a pet form of Fabian .
German: from Middle High German fabel ‘fable’, a nickname for a storyteller.

variants.name: Fable
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Fabel, which is probably a diminutive of Fab(b)e, a pet form of Fabian .

variants.name: Faubion
meanings: Altered form, under the French influence in Alsace, France, of German   Fabian  .

variants.name: Fabis
meanings: Polish (Fabiś) and Slovak (Fabiš): from a derivative of the personal name Fabian .

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

variants.name: Edoardo
meanings: From English. See Edward .

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Fabian was born in 1409, in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Fabian, was 29 and his mother, Agnes De Childrey, was 26. He married Johanna Hasant in 1430, in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1471, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Fabian est né en 1409, à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Fabian, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes De Childrey, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Hasant en 1430, à Childrey, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1471, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Fabian 1409 in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fabian 29 und seine Mutter Agnes De Childrey 26. Er hat 1430 in Childrey, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Johanna Hasant geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1471 im Alter von 62 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Fabian è nato il nel 1409 nel Childrey, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Fabian, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Agnes De Childrey, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Hasant nel 1430, nel Childrey, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1471, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 62 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Fabianが1409年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーで生まれた時，父John Fabianは29歳，母Agnes De Childreyは26歳であった。1430年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアチルドリーでJohanna Hasantと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1471年にイギリスイギリスで62歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Fabian(이)가 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치드리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fabian(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes De Childrey(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1430년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치드리에서 Johanna Hasant(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1471년 영국 잉글랜드에서 62세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Fabian nasceu em 1409, em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Fabian, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes De Childrey, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Hasant em 1430, em Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1471, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Fabian родился в 1409 г. в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Fabian было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes De Childrey, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Hasant в 1430 г. в местности чаилдри, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1471 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edward Fabian nació en 1409, en Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Fabian, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Agnes De Childrey, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Johanna Hasant en 1430, en Childrey, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1471, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años.
